_comment: Slot-net ground truth (2026-07-01): interface eth0 on the Pi 5, server/G2S host = 192.168.50.2, pool .100-.200, VLAN 50 = 192.168.50.0/24. LIVE CONFIG for the running casinonet-dns unit: tools/run_dns_discovery.py loads this exact file (default config_path, unit WorkingDirectory=G2S/) and its CLI overrides ONLY dhcp.enabled/interface/server_ip and the 'auto' hostname targets - every other key here, notably forward_dns, is live, not a fallback. Do NOT set interface to 'auto' - auto-detect can leak the home-LAN IP (rogue-DHCP hazard, see project notes 2026-06-15).

static_leases.comment: Add static MAC to IP mappings here

dns._forward_dns_comment: Intentionally EMPTY - the slot net is offline by design. Forwarding (previously 8.8.8.8/8.8.4.4) leaked home-LAN DNS answers onto the slot net (EGMs got public IPs they cannot reach, polluting the does-it-use-our-DNS bench data) and, because process_dns_query forwards inline in the single-threaded DNS loop with 2s/upstream timeouts, an unreachable uplink stalled ALL DNS answers (g2s.local included) up to ~4s per unknown query. Unmapped names now simply get no answer.
